/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g  -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest.so -o libgtest.so CMakeFiles/gtest.dir/src/gtest-all.cc.o  -L/home/socrob/space_cobot_ws/src/space_cobot_controller/cmake-build-debug/gtest/gtest/src -Wl,-rpath,/home/socrob/space_cobot_ws/src/space_cobot_controller/cmake-build-debug/gtest/gtest/src -lpthread
